title: Levi's Long Sleeve Tee — Heather Green
image_captions: Front view showing [Heather Green] [Long Sleeve Tee] with [Levi's] logo inside a pink heart outline on chest. Neck tag reading Levi's Size M.
Front view showing [Heather Green] [Long Sleeve Tee] with [Levi's] logo inside a pink heart outline on chest. Neck tag reading Levi's Size M.
Back view showing green heathered fabric with elasticated waistband detail. No tags, measurements, or flaws visible.
Neck tag reading Levi's Size [Size] on green garment.
Vertical tape measure showing 50cm at the hem edge of a sage green garment.
Horizontal tape measure showing 41cm at the garment edge.
Care label showing 90% Polyester, 10% Viscose. Neck tag reading 'TUTUNUZ' Size 32 (EU) / 8 (US).
Back view showing sage green long-sleeve top with gathered puff sleeves and a crew neck.
enhanced_description:
Levi's Long Sleeve Tee — Heather Green
Brand: Levi's
Size: 12A (Youth) / EU 32
Condition: Like New
Composition: 90% Polyester, 10% Viscose
Color: Heather Green

Measurements (Laid Flat):
Pit-to-Pit: 41cm
Length: 50cm

About the Piece
This vintage Levi's long-sleeve tee brings a retro vibe with its classic heather green fabric and playful pink heart logo. Perfect for layering or wearing as a standout piece, it offers that nostalgic streetwear aesthetic without sacrificing comfort. The soft blend of polyester and viscose ensures a relaxed fit that feels great against the skin.

Style Note: Retro Streetwear / Y2K Aesthetic

Key Detail
Features a unique pink heart outline logo with the Levi's name inside on the chest, paired with gathered puff sleeves for a trendy silhouette.

Seller Notes
Shipping: 🚀 Next day shipping guaranteed!

Shop My Closet: Check out my other offers for more Levi's items—I'm happy to offer bundle discounts if you see something else you like!

Questions? Drop a comment or send an offer. I'm responsive and ready to ship.
